welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.login_prompt: Sign in and join the community.

welcome_description: Share various stories in a growing community together.
hero_description: A clear starting point for boards, posts, and member discussions in a public community.
hero_footer: Set up boards, invite members, and let new activity fill this page naturally.
no_posts: Recent posts will appear here after members begin posting.
recent_posts_empty_description: Recent posts will appear here as soon as members publish topics in any board.
no_boards: Popular boards will appear after community activity begins.
popular_boards_empty_title: Popular boards will be ranked by activity
popular_boards_empty_description: Boards move into this area after they receive posts, visits, and member participation.
featured_boards_description: Highlight useful spaces as the community structure takes shape.
empty_board_description: Create or enable boards first. As posts and visits grow, useful spaces will be highlighted here.
empty_board_setup_description: Prepare the categories or boards that visitors should see first.
empty_board_activity_description: Posting and visits help the template choose which boards deserve attention.
guide_rule_3: Post updates in the right board.
